_doc: 果仁 indicator -> local provider field/expression + validated parity. Derived snapshot of guorn_local_field_mapping.md (CANONICAL). NON-FORMAL. Built from 果仁-parity ladder rungs 1-4 (2026-06-23).

conventions.display_lag: T-1 (signal date = trading day before the holding 开始日期), not the buy date
conventions.amount_to_yi: 成交额(亿元) = $amount / 1e5  ($amount is in 千元)
conventions.total_mv_unit: $total_mv is 万元; 果仁 总市值(亿) * 1e4 = 万元
conventions.bp_scale: equity(元)/total_mv(万元) -> *1e4 to match displayed BP
conventions.houfuquan: adjc = $close * $adj_factor; price RATIOs are 复权-base-invariant; raw close is wrong
conventions.single_quarter: $<field>_sq_q0 = latest single quarter; _sq_q4 = year-ago same quarter; TTM = sum(_sq_q0.._sq_q3); read via D.features (NOT raw pit_ledger)
conventions.pit_gate_timing: gate as-of rebalance day (lag-0); effective_date>disclosure STRICT (§3.2)

validated.note: PARENT equity (exc_min_int), NOT inc_min_int; residual = 总市值 2-dec display-round + equity PIT-boundary
$pe_ttm NOT $pe static (13.8% off); residual = price signal-day
numerator=股价振幅 NOT |1日涨幅| (aichat doc wrong); avg-of-ratios; residual ~0.86x = undocumented sub-detail
residual = N-day lookback window-membership counting (NOT data/复权/corp-action; window N=250 sharp min; no-corp-action subset equally off)
same root cause as 250日涨幅 (MA window-membership; no-corp-action subset equally off)
dividend-yield path; residual = price signal-day + TTM-window def
validates ALL expense lines (管理/销售/财务费用 + 营业税金及附加) + revenue/cost at once

un_validatable.guorn: 股价振幅%当日成交额10日
un_validatable.reason: 果仁 displays 0.00 (true value ~2e-6 rounds to zero at 2 decimals); formula provably correct but parity meaningless

doc_corrections.correct: numerator = 股价振幅 (high-low)/prev_close, NOT |1日涨幅|

doc_corrections.says: 归属母公司股东权益合计/总市值

doc_corrections.correct: TOTAL net profit $n_income, not 归母 $n_income_attr_p

coverage_resolved_rung5.path: expense_lines(管理/销售/财务费用+营业税金)

coverage_resolved_rung5.via: 总市值 = close x total_share (both penny-exact)
股东数下降率 = $holder_num_q1/$holder_num_q0 - 1 (consecutive-disclosure change); provider-read 0.14% med / 93% sign on the non-zero EVENT subset (lag-0)
coverage_resolved_rung5.note: RESOLVED 2026-06-25: the rung-5 _q4 was a DEPTH error (depth-1 wins 0.24% >> depth-4 137%; 报告期-grid QEND/ASOF WORSE 3.2x -> NOT a grid/materialization gap). 果仁's factor is a near-inert DISCLOSURE-EVENT signal (non-zero ~2d post-disclosure, median 2d vs 53d; 92% zero); exact zero/event-window serving is a 果仁 convention (unreproduced) but the data path + value mapping are validated. _holder_grid_probe.py + _holder_provider_check.py

coverage_open.note: CORRECTED 2026-06-23: depr_fa_coga_dpba/amort_intang_assets ARE materialized (cum_q0 22.5% populated, bins exist). single-quarter _sq_q0 is 0.91% non-NaN = NaN by SEMI-ANNUAL disclosure cadence (H1+FY cumulative only, never Q1/Q3), NOT a materialization gap. EBITDAQ/FCFQ single-q unreproducible by cadence + recp_disp_fiolta never fetched. Earlier not_materialized claim was a false inference from a 3-stock notna() probe.

materialization_audit_2026_06_23.method: diff(ledger numeric cols, provider bins) + D.features verify; _rung5_materialization_audit.py

indicators.note: single-quarter financial metrics; curated indicators list omits these; HIGHEST-VALUE materialization candidate

report_rc.note: only eps_diffusion primitives materialized (selective by design)

stk_holdertrade.note: only the count materialized (selective by design)
